title: Jenkins Jobs Index Export
description: Output contract for index_jenkins_jobs.py. By default, each controller output file is a flat array of Jenkins job records. Each record contains only the fields requested from the Jenkins Remote Access API: name, fullName, fullDisplayName, url, and _class. The optional nested Jenkins response shape produced by --nested is defined under $defs/nestedExport.

name.description: Job name relative to its parent folder.

fullName.description: Full Jenkins job name, including folder path segments.

url.description: Absolute Jenkins URL for the job.

_class.description: Jenkins model class for the job or folder.

jobs.description: Child jobs returned for folder-like Jenkins items when max depth includes them.
